## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce growthx.ai team to Innerwell's CMS (Prismic) and discuss content publishing strategy for programmatic SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Innerwell uses Prismic CMS for content management, with a focus on programmatic SEO for city/state-level pages](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [growthx.ai's engagement primarily involves programmatic SEO, not traditional editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Current strategy direction differs from standard blog publishing, requiring a follow-up meeting to align on content approach and publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

## Topics

### Prismic CMS Overview

  - [Headless CMS similar to Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Content structured in blocks (e.g., heading, subheading, tags)](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Supports both manual UI editing and API-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [City/state-level pages use a template structure with customizable blocks](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [Template-based approach for city/state pages](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Key components: search filter, breadcrumbs, dynamic results, insurance panel, reviews panel, FAQ panel](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Meta descriptions often dynamically generated outside Prismic](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Ability to edit existing content and launch new pages based on templates](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Programmatic SEO Focus

  - [growthx.ai hired primarily for programmatic SEO, not editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Emphasis on city-level and local landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Differs from traditional blog post approach, requiring a tailored strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### CMS Access and Support

  - [growthx.ai team has access to Prismic](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Innerwell team offered to provide additional guidance (e.g., screen recordings) for specific update processes](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to discuss specific content strategy and publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [growthx.ai to develop and present a tailored programmatic SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Innerwell to provide additional CMS guidance if needed (e.g., screen recordings for specific processes)](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [growthx.ai team to explore Prismic CMS and note any questions for Innerwell team](https://fathom.video/share/ay5ffu2ZooKfLciupLv5zApcHcGfkE2n?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
